strategy: Stock investing only - buy shares, no options
market_summary: Markets consolidating near highs with tech leading, Fed signals dovish stance, strong earnings momentum continues.

picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
picks.thesis: AI infrastructure spending accelerating, reports Wednesday showing datacenter revenue beat expectations by 18%.
picks.how_to_buy: Buy 10 shares at market open or set limit order at $892
picks.sell_when: Sell all shares when price hits $945 or drops below $872 stop loss.
picks.robinhood_tip: In Robinhood: search NVDA, tap Buy, select Shares, enter quantity, choose Market order.

picks.name: Cassava Sciences Inc.
picks.thesis: Phase 3 Alzheimer's drug data readout expected Monday May 18, potential FDA breakthrough designation.
picks.how_to_buy: Buy 200 shares with limit order at $28.50
picks.sell_when: Sell all shares immediately after trial data announcement or cut losses at $25.
picks.robinhood_tip: In Robinhood: search SAVA, tap Buy, select Shares, set Limit order at $28.50.

picks.name: Coinbase Global Inc.
picks.thesis: Bitcoin surging past $68K, institutional crypto trading volumes up 140% week-over-week.
picks.sell_when: Sell all shares at $242 target or immediately if Bitcoin drops below $64K.
picks.robinhood_tip: In Robinhood: search COIN, tap Buy, select Shares, enter quantity, choose Market order.
